article_title: How Elon Musk and Sam Altman went from besties to bitter rivals

article_items.title: How Elon Musk and Sam Altman went from besties to bitter rivals
article_items.description: In the 11 years since Elon Musk and Sam Altman helped start OpenAI, their once tight bond has unwound, leaving the two billionaires fighting it out in court.
